zh.lifeSummary: 當Ada de Morville於大約1131年出生在英國英格蘭波藍德卡萊爾時，她的父親Simon De MORVILLE54歲，母親Ada d'Engaine52歲。她和Roger Bertram至少有3個兒子和2個女兒。她去世於1170年6月30日在英國諾圖波藍德米特福德米特福德享年40歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Ada de Morville于大约1131年出生在英国英格兰波藍德卡萊爾时，她的父亲Simon De MORVILLE54岁，母亲Ada d'Engaine52岁。她和Roger Bertram至少有3个儿子和2个女儿。她去世于1170年6月30日在英国諾圖波藍德米特福德米特福德享年40岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Morville
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Moorfield
meanings: English: locative name from Morville (Shrops), which is recorded as Mamerfeld in the 12th century, Momerefeld in 1255, and Morfelde in 1464.

nameMeanings.name: Ada
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Of uncertain origin; it was not in general use before the late 18th century. It may be a Latinate variant of the biblical name Adah . However, it has also been explained as a pet form of Adele and Adelaide , Germanic female names of which the first element is adal ‘noble’. It was borne by a 7th-century abbess of Saint-Julien-des-Prés at Le Mans.

en.lifeSummary: When Ada de Morville was born about 1131, in Carlisle, Cumberland, England, United Kingdom, her father, Simon De MORVILLE, was 54 and her mother, Ada d'Engaine, was 52. She had at least 3 sons and 2 daughters with Roger Bertram. She died on 30 June 1170, in Mitford, Mitford, Northumberland, England, at the age of 40.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Ada de Morville est née environ 1131, à Carlisle, Cumberland, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Simon De MORVILLE, avait 54 ans et sa mère, Ada d'Engaine, avait 52 ans. Elle a eu au moins 3 fils et 2 filles avec Roger Bertram. Elle est décédée le 30 juin 1170, à Mitford, Mitford, Northumberland, Angleterre, à l’âge de 40 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Ada de Morville um 1131 in Carlisle, Cumberland, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Simon De MORVILLE 54 und ihre Mutter Ada d'Engaine 52. Sie hatte mit Roger Bertram mindestens 3 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie starb am 30. Juni 1170 im Alter von 40 Jahren in Mitford, Mitford, Northumberland, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Ada de Morville è nata il circa 1131 nel Carlisle, Cumberland, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, sua padre, Simon De MORVILLE, aveva 54 anni e sua madre, Ada d'Engaine, aveva 52 anni. Lei avuto almeno 3 figli e 2 figlie con Roger Bertram. Morì il 30 giugno 1170, nel Mitford, Mitford, Northumberland, England, all'età di 40 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Ada de Morvilleが約1131年にイギリスイギリスクウンバーランドカーリスルで生まれた時，父Simon De MORVILLEは54歳，母Ada d'Engaineは52歳であった。彼女はRoger Bertramとの間に少なくとも3人の息子と2人の娘をもうけた。彼女は1170年6月30日にイギリスノースウンバーランドミトフォードミトフォードで40歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Ada de Morville(이)가 대략 1131년 영국 잉글랜드 쿠벌랜드 칼리슬일에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Simon De MORVILLE(은)는 54세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Ada d'Engaine(은)는 52세였다. 그녀는 Roger Bertram(와)과 적어도 세 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1170년 6월 30일 영국 노르스벌랜드 미트퍼드 미트퍼드에서 40세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Ada de Morville nasceu aproximadamente 1131, em Carlisle, Cumberland, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Simon De MORVILLE, tinha 54 anos e sua mãe, Ada d'Engaine, tinha 52 anos. Ela teve pelo menos 3 filhos e 2 filhas com Roger Bertram. Ela faleceu em 30 de junho de 1170, em Mitford, Mitford, Northumberland, Inglaterra, com 40 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Ada de Morville родилась около 1131 г. в местности карлисл, кумбирланд, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Simon De MORVILLE было 54 года, а матери, которую звали Ada d'Engaine, 52. У неё было по крайней мере 3 сына и 2 дочери от Roger Bertram. Она умерла 30 июня 1170 г. в местности митфорд, митфорд, нортумбирланд, Англия в возрасте 40 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Ada de Morville nació aproximadamente 1131, en Carlisle, Cumberland, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Simon De MORVILLE, tenía 54 años y su mamá, Ada d'Engaine, tenía 52 años. Tuvo por lo menos 3 hijos y 2 hijas con Roger Bertram. Murió el 30 de junio de 1170, en Mitford, Mitford, Northumberland, Inglaterra, a la edad de 40 años.
